title: SpaceX Seeks $135 a Share for $75 Billion IPO, Reuters Says
full_text: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX aims to sell 555.6 million shares ​at $135 apiece for its record-breaking $75 ​billion ⁠initial public ​offering, Reuters reported, citing an unidentified person familiar with the matter.
